name: test-heuristics
description: Practical test-suite review, design, triage, strategy, and pruning for unit, integration, e2e/UI, exploratory, property-based, contract, snapshot, mutation, and performance tests. Grounded in canonical testing literature.

inspired_by.name: xUnit Test Patterns: Refactoring Test Code
inspired_by.author: Gerard Meszaros
inspired_by.contribution: The canonical test-smell catalog and the test-fixture / object-mother / test-data-builder vocabulary used across the unit, integration, snapshot, and failure-modes references.

inspired_by.name: Working Effectively with Legacy Code
inspired_by.author: Michael Feathers
inspired_by.contribution: Characterization tests, seams, and the test-as-pin-down technique. Anchors the characterization-purpose framing across unit and integration playbooks.

inspired_by.name: Test-Driven Development By Example
inspired_by.author: Kent Beck
inspired_by.contribution: Spec-purpose framing, the red/green/refactor cadence, and the discipline of writing the test that drives the design.

inspired_by.name: Unit Testing: Principles, Practices, and Patterns
inspired_by.author: Vladimir Khorikov
inspired_by.contribution: The four-quadrant test-value model: protection-against-regressions x resistance-to-refactoring x fast-feedback x maintainability. Anchors the false-pass mode and the score rubric's robustness dimension.

inspired_by.name: Explore It! Reduce Risk and Increase Confidence with Exploratory Testing
inspired_by.author: Elisabeth Hendrickson
inspired_by.contribution: Charter-driven exploratory testing, session-based test management, and the role of automated tests as scaffolding for exploration.

inspired_by.name: Rapid Software Testing methodology
inspired_by.author: James Bach and Michael Bolton
inspired_by.contribution: The SFDIPOT mnemonic for testable aspects and the FEW HICCUPPS consistency oracles, distilled into the oracles core reference.

inspired_by.name: QuickCheck: A Lightweight Tool for Random Testing of Haskell Programs
inspired_by.author: John Hughes and Koen Claessen
inspired_by.contribution: The original property-based testing framework and the shrinking idea - failures shrink to a minimal counterexample.

inspired_by.name: Hypothesis design rationale
inspired_by.author: David R. MacIver
inspired_by.contribution: Practical generator design, choosing properties, and the integration of property-based testing into mainstream test suites.

inspired_by.name: Agile Testing: A Practical Guide for Testers and Agile Teams
inspired_by.author: Lisa Crispin and Janet Gregory
inspired_by.contribution: The agile testing quadrants and the practical framing of test-strategy decisions across layers.

inspired_by.name: Succeeding with Agile
inspired_by.author: Mike Cohn
inspired_by.contribution: The original test pyramid framing - bias toward fast unit tests at the base, fewer integration tests, fewest UI tests at the top.

inspired_by.name: The Testing Trophy
inspired_by.author: Kent C. Dodds
inspired_by.contribution: An alternative to the pyramid emphasizing integration tests as the highest-value layer for typical web apps; informs the strategy playbook's discussion of layer investment.

inspired_by.name: The Practical Test Pyramid
inspired_by.author: Ham Vocke
inspired_by.contribution: Concrete practical layer definitions and the often-quoted critique that pyramid is more shape-suggestion than rule.

inspired_by.name: Approval Testing
inspired_by.author: Llewellyn Falco
inspired_by.contribution: The approval-testing pattern (snapshot-style review of generated output) and the discipline of human review of every diff.

inspired_by.name: An Analysis and Survey of the Development of Mutation Testing
inspired_by.author: Yue Jia and Mark Harman
inspired_by.contribution: Comprehensive survey of mutation testing techniques, equivalent-mutant problem, and operator selection strategies.

inspired_by.name: Are Mutants a Valid Substitute for Real Faults in Software Testing?
inspired_by.author: Rene Just
inspired_by.contribution: Empirical evidence that mutation score correlates with real-fault detection, validating mutation testing as a meaningful signal.

inspired_by.name: Consumer-Driven Contracts: A Service Evolution Pattern
inspired_by.author: Ian Robinson
inspired_by.contribution: The CDC pattern - consumers state what they actually use; providers verify that subset. Foundation of modern contract testing.

inspired_by.name: Pact Foundation documentation
inspired_by.author: Pact Foundation contributors
inspired_by.contribution: Practical patterns for broker-published pacts, provider-side verification, and integrating contract tests into CI.

inspired_by.name: An Empirical Analysis of Flaky Tests
inspired_by.author: Qingzhou Luo
inspired_by.contribution: Categorization of flakiness root causes (async wait, ordering, network, time, concurrency) used in the failure-modes file.

inspired_by.name: Flaky Tests at Google and How We Mitigate Them
inspired_by.author: John Micco
inspired_by.contribution: Industrial-scale flakiness mitigation: quarantine, ownership, deflake-or-delete deadlines.

inspired_by.name: Systems Performance: Enterprise and the Cloud
inspired_by.author: Brendan Gregg
inspired_by.contribution: The USE method (utilization, saturation, errors) and the discipline of profiling before optimizing. Anchors the performance playbook's choice-of-what-to-measure framing.
